summary.en: Cures meats and blocks botulism; linked to nitrosamine formation concerns.
summary.pt-BR: Cura carnes e bloqueia botulismo; ligado a preocupações com nitrosaminas.

detail.en: Sodium nitrite (E250) is essential for cured-meat safety but can contribute to nitrosamines. Processed meats are classified carcinogenic by IARC. Rated high.
detail.pt-BR: Nitrito de sódio (E250) é essencial para a segurança de carnes curadas, mas pode contribuir para nitrosaminas. Carnes processadas são classificadas como carcinogênicas pela IARC. Classificado como alto.

summary.en: Can form nitrosamines; linked to processed-meat cancer risk (IARC).
summary.pt-BR: Can form nitrosamines; linked to processed-meat cancer risk (IARC).

detail.en: Can form nitrosamines; linked to processed-meat cancer risk (IARC).
detail.pt-BR: Can form nitrosamines; linked to processed-meat cancer risk (IARC).

summary.en: Converts toward nitrite in cured foods; shares nitrosamine concerns.
summary.pt-BR: Converte-se em nitrito em alimentos curados; compartilha preocupações com nitrosaminas.

detail.en: Sodium nitrate (E251) is used in longer cures and can form nitrite in situ. Rated high alongside nitrite for the same processed-meat rationale.
detail.pt-BR: Nitrato de sódio (E251) é usado em curas mais longas e pode formar nitrito in situ. Classificado como alto junto com o nitrito, pelo mesmo raciocínio das carnes processadas.

summary.en: Converts to nitrite; nitrosamine formation concern.
summary.pt-BR: Converts to nitrite; nitrosamine formation concern.

detail.en: Converts to nitrite; nitrosamine formation concern.
detail.pt-BR: Converts to nitrite; nitrosamine formation concern.

summary.pt-BR: Propyl Gallate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Propyl Gallate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Synthetic antioxidant used to keep fats and packaged foods from going rancid.
summary.pt-BR: Antioxidante sintético usado para evitar a rancidez de gorduras e alimentos embalados.

detail.en: BHA (E320) is classified by IARC as possibly carcinogenic to humans (Group 2B) based mainly on animal evidence. Food use is still permitted within limits in many regions. Sage rates it high so it stands out on the label scan.
detail.pt-BR: BHA (E320) é classificado pela IARC como possivelmente carcinogênico para humanos (Grupo 2B), com base sobretudo em evidência animal. O uso em alimentos ainda é permitido dentro de limites em muitas regiões. O Sage classifica como alto para destacá-lo na leitura do rótulo.

summary.en: Synthetic antioxidant closely related to BHA, used in fats and packaging.
summary.pt-BR: Antioxidante sintético próximo do BHA, usado em gorduras e embalagens.

detail.en: BHT (E321) slows fat oxidation in foods. Safety reviews are mixed across agencies and decades of use; Sage rates it high to match a cautious stance similar to other synthetic phenolic antioxidants.
detail.pt-BR: BHT (E321) atrasa a oxidação de gorduras. Revisões de segurança variam entre agências e décadas de uso; o Sage classifica como alto, alinhado a uma postura cautelosa semelhante à de outros antioxidantes fenólicos sintéticos.

summary.en: Usually from soy or sunflower; helps emulsions in chocolate and baked goods.
summary.pt-BR: Em geral de soja ou girassol; ajuda emulsões em chocolate e assados.

detail.en: Lecithins (E322) are naturally occurring emulsifiers. Subtypes like E322ii collapse to this parent in Sage. Rated low.
detail.pt-BR: Lecitinas (E322) são emulsificantes de ocorrência natural. Subtipos como E322ii são agrupados neste pai no Sage. Classificadas como baixas.

summary.en: Sodium Lactate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Sodium Lactate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Sodium Lactate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Sodium Lactate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: The acid in citrus fruits, widely used to brighten flavour and preserve colour.
summary.pt-BR: O ácido dos cítricos, amplamente usado para realçar sabor e preservar cor.

detail.en: Citric acid (E330) is ubiquitous and rated low for typical food use.
detail.pt-BR: Ácido cítrico (E330) é ubíquo e classificado como baixo no uso alimentar típico.

summary.en: Sodium Citrates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Sodium Citrates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.pt-BR: Tartaric Acid is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Tartaric Acid is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Tartaric Acid is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: High phosphate intake associated with bone and kidney concerns.
summary.pt-BR: High phosphate intake associated with bone and kidney concerns.

detail.en: High phosphate intake associated with bone and kidney concerns.
detail.pt-BR: High phosphate intake associated with bone and kidney concerns.

summary.en: Added phosphates that adjust acidity and help hold moisture.
summary.pt-BR: Fosfatos adicionados que ajustam acidez e ajudam a reter umidade.

detail.en: Sodium phosphates (E339) are widely used in processed foods. EFSA evaluates them with other phosphates under a shared intake limit. Moderate rating reflects that group limit.
detail.pt-BR: Fosfatos de sódio (E339) são amplamente usados em processados. A EFSA os avalia com outros fosfatos sob um limite compartilhado. A classificação moderada reflete esse limite em grupo.

summary.en: Potassium forms of food phosphates used for acidity and texture.
summary.pt-BR: Formas de potássio dos fosfatos alimentares, usadas para acidez e textura.

detail.en: Potassium phosphates (E340) serve similar roles to sodium phosphates and share the EFSA group ADI for phosphates. Rated moderate for the same cumulative-intake reason.
detail.pt-BR: Fosfatos de potássio (E340) têm papéis semelhantes aos de sódio e compartilham o ADI em grupo da EFSA. Classificados como moderados pelo mesmo motivo de ingestão acumulada.

summary.en: Calcium Phosphates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Calcium Phosphates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Calcium Phosphates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Calcium Phosphates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Seaweed-derived thickener; some studies suggest digestive sensitivity for a subset of people.
summary.pt-BR: Espessante de algas; alguns estudos sugerem sensibilidade digestiva em parte das pessoas.

detail.en: Carrageenan (E407) thickens plant milks and desserts. Evidence on gut irritation is mixed and under ongoing review; Sage rates it moderate as a cautious middle ground.
detail.pt-BR: Carragena (E407) engrossa leites vegetais e sobremesas. A evidência sobre irritação intestinal é mista e segue em revisão; o Sage classifica como moderada, como meio-termo cauteloso.

summary.en: Locust Bean Gum is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Locust Bean Gum is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Locust Bean Gum is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Locust Bean Gum is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Plant fibre gum used to thicken dairy alternatives and sauces.
summary.pt-BR: Goma de fibra vegetal usada para engrossar molhos e alternativas lácteas.

detail.en: Guar gum (E412) is a soluble fibre thickener. Rated low at normal food levels.
detail.pt-BR: Goma guar (E412) é um espessante de fibra solúvel. Classificada como baixa nos níveis alimentares normais.

summary.en: Acacia Gum (Gum Arabic) is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Acacia Gum (Gum Arabic) is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Acacia Gum (Gum Arabic) is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Acacia Gum (Gum Arabic) is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: A fermentation-derived gum that thickens sauces and gluten-free baking.
summary.pt-BR: Goma de fermentação que engrossa molhos e assados sem glúten.

detail.en: Xanthan gum (E415) is widely used and generally well tolerated; large amounts can loosen stools in some people. Rated low.
detail.pt-BR: Goma xantana (E415) é amplamente usada e em geral bem tolerada; grandes quantidades podem amolecer as fezes em algumas pessoas. Classificada como baixa.

summary.en: Sorbitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Sorbitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Sorbitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Sorbitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Glycerol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Glycerol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Glycerol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Glycerol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Emulsifier; animal studies suggest possible gut-microbiome effects.
summary.pt-BR: Emulsifier; animal studies suggest possible gut-microbiome effects.

detail.en: Emulsifier; animal studies suggest possible gut-microbiome effects.
detail.pt-BR: Emulsifier; animal studies suggest possible gut-microbiome effects.

summary.en: Pectin is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Pectin is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Pectin is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Pectin is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Phosphate salts that help texture, moisture, and some baked goods rise.
summary.pt-BR: Sais de fosfato que ajudam textura, umidade e o crescimento de alguns assados.

detail.en: Diphosphates (E450) appear in processed meats, cheese, and baking powders. They fall under EFSA's group phosphate ADI. Sage rates them moderate because cumulative phosphate intake, not a single serving, is the main dietary concern.
detail.pt-BR: Difosfatos (E450) aparecem em carnes processadas, queijos e fermentos químicos. Entram no ADI em grupo de fosfatos da EFSA. O Sage classifica como moderado porque a preocupação principal é a ingestão acumulada, não uma porção isolada.

summary.en: A phosphate salt used to retain moisture and texture in processed foods.
summary.pt-BR: Sal de fosfato usado para reter umidade e textura em alimentos processados.

detail.en: Triphosphates (E451) are part of the same phosphate group reviewed by EFSA. They improve water binding in meats and convenience foods. Moderate rating reflects the group ADI for phosphates rather than a unique hazard from E451 alone.
detail.pt-BR: Trifosfatos (E451) fazem parte do mesmo grupo de fosfatos avaliado pela EFSA. Melhoram a retenção de água em carnes e alimentos prontos. A classificação moderada reflete o ADI em grupo dos fosfatos, não um risco exclusivo do E451.

summary.en: Helps noodles and processed foods hold water and stay firm on the shelf.
summary.pt-BR: Ajuda massas e alimentos processados a reter água e manter a textura.

detail.en: Polyphosphates (E452) bind water and minerals in foods like instant noodles and processed meats. EFSA set a group acceptable daily intake for phosphates; typical packaged-food use is within that framework, though high total phosphate intake from many sources can matter for kidney health. Sage rates them moderate for that reason.
detail.pt-BR: Polifosfatos (E452) ligam água e minerais em alimentos como macarrão instantâneo e carnes processadas. A EFSA definiu uma ingestão diária aceitável em grupo para fosfatos; o uso típico em embalados fica nesse contexto, embora a soma de fosfatos de várias fontes importe para a saúde renal. O Sage classifica como moderado por isso.

summary.en: Emulsifier; emerging research on gut-microbiome effects.
summary.pt-BR: Emulsifier; emerging research on gut-microbiome effects.

detail.en: Emulsifier; emerging research on gut-microbiome effects.
detail.pt-BR: Emulsifier; emerging research on gut-microbiome effects.

summary.en: Helps oil and water stay mixed in spreads, baked goods, and peanut butter.
summary.pt-BR: Ajuda óleo e água a permanecerem misturados em cremes, assados e manteiga de amendoim.

detail.en: Mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids (E471) are among the most common emulsifiers. They are generally considered low concern at typical use levels. Rated low.
detail.pt-BR: Mono e diglicerídeos de ácidos graxos (E471) estão entre os emulsificantes mais comuns. Em geral são considerados de baixa preocupação nos níveis típicos. Classificados como baixos.

summary.en: DATEM is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: DATEM is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: DATEM is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: DATEM is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.pt-BR: Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Includes baking soda forms used to regulate acidity and help dough rise.
summary.pt-BR: Inclui formas de bicarbonato usadas para acidez e crescimento da massa.

detail.en: Sodium carbonates (E500) are everyday kitchen chemistry in packaged form. Rated low for typical food use.
detail.pt-BR: Carbonatos de sódio (E500) são química cotidiana de cozinha em forma embalada. Classificados como baixos no uso alimentar típico.

summary.en: Potassium salts that adjust acidity in cocoa and other foods.
summary.pt-BR: Sais de potássio que ajustam a acidez em cacau e outros alimentos.

detail.en: Potassium carbonates (E501) are long-used acidity regulators. Rated low at food-use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Carbonatos de potássio (E501) são reguladores de acidez de uso antigo. Classificados como baixos nos níveis alimentares.

summary.en: Ammonium Carbonates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Ammonium Carbonates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Ammonium Carbonates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Ammonium Carbonates is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Calcium Chloride is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Calcium Chloride is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Calcium Chloride is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Calcium Chloride is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Glucono Delta-Lactone is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Glucono Delta-Lactone is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Glucono Delta-Lactone is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Glucono Delta-Lactone is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Adds umami; some people report sensitivity, though evidence is limited.
summary.pt-BR: Adiciona umami; algumas pessoas relatam sensibilidade, embora a evidência seja limitada.

detail.en: Monosodium glutamate (E621) is the sodium salt of a common amino acid and is used to deepen savoury flavour. Controlled studies have not consistently confirmed widespread sensitivity, but some people still prefer to avoid it. Sage rates MSG low risk for the general population.
detail.pt-BR: Glutamato monossódico (E621) é o sal de sódio de um aminoácido comum e aprofunda o sabor salgado. Estudos controlados não confirmam de forma consistente sensibilidade ampla, mas algumas pessoas preferem evitá-lo. O Sage classifica o MSG como baixo risco para a população geral.

summary.en: Nucleotide flavour enhancer often paired with MSG for umami.
summary.pt-BR: Realçador de sabor do tipo nucleotídeo, frequentemente combinado com MSG.

detail.en: Disodium guanylate (E627) boosts savoury taste, especially with glutamate. It is widely permitted and generally considered low concern at food-use levels. Rated low.
detail.pt-BR: Guanilato dissódico (E627) reforça o sabor salgado, sobretudo com glutamato. É amplamente permitido e em geral considerado de baixa preocupação nos níveis alimentares. Classificado como baixo.

summary.en: Another nucleotide enhancer that works with MSG for umami depth.
summary.pt-BR: Outro realçador do tipo nucleotídeo que potencializa o umami com MSG.

detail.en: Disodium inosinate (E631) is used like guanylate to amplify savoury flavour. Food-use levels are typically low; Sage rates it low.
detail.pt-BR: Inosinato dissódico (E631) é usado como o guanilato para amplificar o sabor salgado. Os níveis em alimentos costumam ser baixos; o Sage classifica como baixo.

summary.en: Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Zero-calorie sweetener; long-term evidence is still developing.
summary.pt-BR: Adoçante sem calorias; a evidência de longo prazo ainda está em evolução.

detail.en: Acesulfame K (E950) is permitted worldwide within ADIs. Sage rates it moderate while longer-term research continues.
detail.pt-BR: Acesulfame K (E950) é permitido mundialmente dentro dos ADIs. O Sage classifica como moderado enquanto a pesquisa de longo prazo continua.

summary.en: Common diet-drink sweetener; IARC rated it possibly carcinogenic (2B) while JECFA kept the ADI.
summary.pt-BR: Adoçante comum em refrigerantes diet; a IARC classificou como possivelmente carcinogênico (2B), enquanto o JECFA manteve o ADI.

detail.en: Aspartame (E951) remains widely approved. In 2023 IARC classified it as Group 2B (possibly carcinogenic) based on limited evidence, while JECFA reaffirmed the ADI. Sage uses a moderate tier to reflect that mixed but closely watched status.
detail.pt-BR: Aspartame (E951) segue amplamente aprovado. Em 2023 a IARC o classificou no Grupo 2B (possivelmente carcinogênico) com evidência limitada, enquanto o JECFA reafirmou o ADI. O Sage usa nível moderado para refletir esse status misto, porém monitorado.

summary.en: Banned in the United States; permitted with limits in the EU.
summary.pt-BR: Banned in the United States; permitted with limits in the EU.

detail.en: Banned in the United States; permitted with limits in the EU.
detail.pt-BR: Banned in the United States; permitted with limits in the EU.

summary.en: Saccharin is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Saccharin is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Saccharin is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Saccharin is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Heat-stable sweetener; some research explores effects when heated or on the microbiome.
summary.pt-BR: Adoçante estável ao calor; algumas pesquisas exploram efeitos quando aquecido ou no microbioma.

detail.en: Sucralose (E955) is widely used in diet products. Emerging studies are mixed; Sage rates it moderate as a cautious default.
detail.pt-BR: Sucralose (E955) é muito usada em produtos diet. Estudos emergentes são mistos; o Sage classifica como moderada como padrão cauteloso.

summary.en: Steviol Glycosides (Stevia) is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Steviol Glycosides (Stevia) is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Steviol Glycosides (Stevia) is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Steviol Glycosides (Stevia) is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Maltitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Maltitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Maltitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Maltitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Xylitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
summary.pt-BR: Xylitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

detail.en: Xylitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.
detail.pt-BR: Xylitol is a permitted food additive at regulated use levels.

summary.en: Recent studies suggest a possible association with cardiovascular events.
summary.pt-BR: Recent studies suggest a possible association with cardiovascular events.

detail.en: Recent studies suggest a possible association with cardiovascular events.
detail.pt-BR: Recent studies suggest a possible association with cardiovascular events.

summary.en: Synthetic antioxidant that slows rancidity in oils and fried snacks.
summary.pt-BR: Antioxidante sintético que atrasa a rancidez em óleos e salgadinhos.

detail.en: TBHQ (E319) protects fats from oxidation. Allowed levels are regulated; some people prefer to limit frequent intake of foods that rely on synthetic antioxidants. Sage rates it high among common antioxidants because of that cautionary profile.
detail.pt-BR: TBHQ (E319) protege gorduras da oxidação. Os níveis permitidos são regulados; algumas pessoas preferem limitar o consumo frequente de alimentos que dependem de antioxidantes sintéticos. O Sage classifica como alto entre antioxidantes comuns por esse perfil de cautela.

summary.en: Keeps powders free-flowing; common in spices and dry mixes.
summary.pt-BR: Mantém pós soltos; comum em temperos e misturas secas.

detail.en: Silicon dioxide (E551) is an inert anti-caking aid. It is poorly absorbed and generally recognized as low concern in food. Rated low.
detail.pt-BR: Dióxido de silício (E551) é um antiaglomerante inerte. É pouco absorvido e em geral considerado de baixa preocupação em alimentos. Classificado como baixo.

summary.en: Vitamin B3 added for fortification in some foods.
summary.pt-BR: Vitamina B3 adicionada para fortificação em alguns alimentos.

detail.en: Niacin (E375) is vitamin B3. Food fortification uses are rated low.
detail.pt-BR: Niacina (E375) é a vitamina B3. Usos de fortificação são classificados como baixos.
